key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to scan session logs for usage data

key.name: display-mode
key.description: What to show in the top bar: "cost" for daily cost, "tokens" for token count, "both" for both

key.name: panel-show-session
key.description: Whether to show the 5-hour session utilization in the top bar

key.name: panel-show-weekly
key.description: Whether to show the 7-day weekly utilization in the top bar
